= Sample Cup 2024 =

▪ Group A

Group A | Sampland    Testonia    Fixturia    Mockland

Fri Jun/14 21:00  Sampland  5-1  Mockland  @ National Arena
Fri Jun/14 18:00  Testonia  1-1  Fixturia  @ Testonia Stadium

Sat Jun/15
Tue Jun/18 21:00  Fixturia  1-0  Sampland  @ National Arena
Tue Jun/18 18:00  Mockland  1-1  Testonia  @ Testonia Stadium

▪ Round of 16

Sat Jun/29 18:00  Sampland  2-1  Testonia  @ Berlin Arena

▪ Final

Sun Jul/14 21:00  Sampland  3-3 pen. (1-1)  Fixturia  @ Olympiastadion
